hero.description: Specialists in plumbing, renovation and sanitary installations for {{years}} years. Fast response, quality work and full guarantee on every job.

items.title: General Plumbing
items.desc: Installation, repair and replacement of pipes, faucets, water heaters and water supply systems. Emergency response available 24/7.

items.title: Sanitary Installations
items.desc: Full installation and renovation of bathrooms, toilets, walk-in showers, bathtubs and premium sanitary equipment. Flawless finish guaranteed.

items.title: Renovation & Construction
items.desc: Complete renovation works: tiling, wall coverings, partitions, suspended ceilings and bespoke interior fittings tailored to your project.

items.title: Drain Unblocking
items.desc: Drain unblocking, hydro-jetting, camera inspection and drainage problem treatment for both residential and commercial properties.

items.title: Heating & Air Conditioning
items.desc: Installation and maintenance of boilers, radiators, underfloor heating, heat pumps and reversible air conditioning systems.

items.title: Leak Detection
items.desc: Non-destructive detection and location of hidden leaks using thermography and acoustic sensors. Guaranteed repair included.

items.title: Mixed / All Trades
items.desc: Combined service covering multiple trades: plumbing, renovation, sanitary, heating and finishing. A comprehensive solution for multi-work projects.

about.title: Your Specialist in Plumbing & Sanitary Renovation

process.title: Rigorous Follow-Through On Every Job
process.description: From your first contact to the final handover, we guide you through every step with full transparency and professionalism.

items.title: On-Site Assessment & Free Quote
items.desc: We visit your property, assess the situation and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote with full cost transparency.

items.title: Works & Installation
items.desc: Our certified technicians carry out the work with professional equipment, on schedule and fully compliant with current standards.

items.title: Handover & Guarantee
items.desc: Final quality check in your presence, full warranty documents issued and after-service support for your peace of mind.

stats.title: A Trusted Company For Over 15 Years.
stats.description: Our reputation is built on the quality of our work, the speed of our response and the lasting satisfaction of our residential and commercial clients.

items.text: Very fast response after a major leak. The team was professional, tidy and efficient. The repair has held perfectly for months now.
Complete bathroom renovation done in 5 working days. Beautiful result, exactly as quoted — no surprises. Highly recommended.
Excellent work installing our new heating system. Attentive technicians, great advice and neat finish throughout. Very satisfied.

items.title: 5 signs of a hidden water leak in your home
items.author: Technical Team
items.excerpt: An unusually high water bill, damp patches or a persistent smell — learn how to spot a hidden leak before it becomes serious.

items.title: Renovating your bathroom: where to start and how to budget
items.author: Jean-Marc Dupont
items.excerpt: Demolition, plumbing, tiling, sanitaryware... our complete guide to planning your bathroom renovation without the stress.

items.title: Annual boiler service: why it's mandatory and how to prepare
items.author: Sarah Benali
items.excerpt: Yearly boiler servicing is a legal requirement. Find out what it involves and how to choose the right provider.
